title: Indian Small Towns’ Romance with Pizzas: A Slice of New Aspirations in Dhampur
description: In March 2024, my colleagues Shubham Kashyap, Aena Rawal and I were on the road to Dhampur again to resume the field work for our study: Forty Years’ Development Saga of Dhampur: Growth Dynamics and Regional Transformation of an Indian Small Town. While I was busy introspecting about how we will go about our work […] The post Indian Small Towns’ Romance with Pizzas: A Slice of New Aspirations in Dhampur appeared first on CPR.
